expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: Tavily-first then Confluence fallback ordering
expectations.evidence: result.md explicitly validates the ordering rule and cites evidence: “report-editor deep research must run `tavily-search` first and use `confluence` only as a recorded fallback” and `deep_research_policy` = `tavily_first_confluence_second`.

expectations.text: [phase_contract][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase3
expectations.evidence: result.md ties the requirement specifically to Phase 3: it cites “Phase 3 description” with “spawn Tavily-first deep-research requests” and Phase 3 `--post` validation of “Tavily-first research artifacts, optional Confluence fallback ordering,” plus Phase 3 artifact families (Tavily artifacts, conditional Confluence artifacts, synthesis).
